author: codex
scope: Reduced relation payload assertion_status=unknown with narrow delivered-status inference for active route operators, static agency service/operation relations, ownership relations, and source/metric containment relations.

constraints.mutation_path: deterministic assertion qualifier/test changes plus bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize

subagents.finding_summary: Rebaselined 5672 unknown metric_context relations and recommended holding the 5647 has_metric mass because value/period/date/as_of_date fields mix actuals, forecasts, budgets, goals, and proposed expenditures. Recommended only the 11-record source/metric containment slice: includes source->metric_claim and metric_of_source metric_claim->source with source provenance matching the source endpoint.

rules.name: active_route_operator_relations
rules.guard: relation_family route_scope; relation_kind operates_route; subject is entity; object is route with route_record_scope true_route; no future/proposed/former/uncertain wording in description or endpoint display names
negative_guards: Proposed route labels such as Proposed B38 Local

rules.name: static_agency_service_relations
rules.guard: relation_family agency_role; relation_kind operates, operates_service, provides_service_to, or provides_service_for; subject and object are distinct entity records; no future/proposed/former/uncertain wording in description or endpoint display names

rules.name: static_ownership_relations
rules.guard: relation_family ownership_role; relation_kind owned_by; subject is not source; object is entity; subject/object are distinct; no future/proposed/former/uncertain wording

rules.name: metric_source_containment_relations
rules.guard: relation_family metric_context; relation_kind includes with source->metric_claim or metric_of_source with metric_claim->source; relation source_id/source_ids includes the source endpoint source_id
negative_guards: provenance mismatch between relation source and source endpoint

verification.focused_tests: bun test packages/pipeline/test/records/assertion-qualifiers.test.ts: 29 pass, 0 fail, 105 expect() calls
verification.materialize: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize completed; Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; retired skipped 243; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
verification.validate: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts validate: Issues 0; submissions 98102; canonical records 84040; wiki pages 7334

remaining_lanes: Relation assertion_status unknown remains 9230, dominated by metric_context 5661, agency_role 636, timeline_context 603, claim_context 509, partnership_engagement 361, funding_award 360, and corridor_scope 308.

Do not broadly promote metric_context has_metric rows without a policy decision: the scout found actuals, forecasts, budgets, goals, projected deficits, proposed expenditures, and before/after observations mixed together.

Next high-confidence relation lanes should use exact relation-kind and endpoint-shape guards, especially funding_award contract/award surfaces, timeline_context scheduled/held event surfaces, or corridor_scope proposed-starting descriptions with explicit false-positive guards.
